message:
test(vdbe): add comprehensive generated column codegen tests for stored and virtual columns

Add test coverage for SQLite GENERATED ALWAYS AS column handling in the
VDBE code generator:

- STORED generated columns emit Copy + arithmetic opcodes (a + b → Add)
- VIRTUAL generated columns emit Null (expression not evaluated at INSERT)
- DEFAULT VALUES with stored generated columns still evaluate expressions
- Explicit column list INSERT with omitted generated column still computes it
- UPDATE recomputes stored generated column when referenced columns change

Each test constructs a schema with generated columns and verifies the
emitted opcode sequence matches expected behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
